Prometheus Alerting Rules: The alerting rules file defines critical production alerts including HighErrorRate (HTTP 5xx rate > 1% over 5 minutes), HighLatency (p99 response time > 500ms over 10 minutes), PodCrashLooping (Kubernetes pod restarting more than 5 times in 15 minutes), and DatabaseConnectionsHigh (connection pool utilization > 80% over 5 minutes). All critical alerts route to the PagerDuty integration for on-call notification; warning-level alerts route to the #alerts Slack channel. Alert labels include severity (critical/warning), team (backend/infra/data), and service name to enable precise routing and filtering. Inhibition rules suppress latency alerts when an upstream error rate alert is already firing to reduce alert fatigue.
